authors.author: Robert Whitney Manzano
Robert Whitney Manzano
Er gab mir Schönheit statt Asche

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v2 v4 v4 v2 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: No longer ashamed, no longer afraid You have washed me white as snow No longer bound, now I am crowned Once in darkness now I know You save You save

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And You give me beauty for ashes And You pull me close to Your heart You have turned my mourning to dancing That's what You do, that's who You are

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Brand new eyes, brand new hands You have wiped away my past Brand new day, brand new life You have pulled me from the lies You save You save

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I'm no longer what I used to be I am stronger because You live in me The old is gone, the new has come I'm alive
